findings_assessment.location: s1 — htmlChecker row, default value column
findings_assessment.justification: The omitted sentence explains that the default Html4HtmlChecker uses the file configured via htmlCheckerConfig. This relationship is already partially conveyed by the htmlCheckerConfig row note which states it is only effective when htmlChecker is not set, implying htmlCheckerConfig is the mechanism for the default checker. No configuration decision is blocked by this omission. Why it persisted through D to E: the Phase E output is identical to the Phase D input for the htmlChecker table row, indicating the fix agent produced a no-op edit, likely judging the minor-severity issue below its fix threshold.
